name: SCC_SLACFinishedInd
title: SCC_SLACFinishedInd
description: The callback is called when a SLAC run has been completed. It marks the point in time when the SECC Discovery process can be started, if a match has been found and as soon as the link is established.
The vehicle can use the function SCC_SLAC_GetAttenResults during this callback to get the measured attenuation values.

parameters.name: Result
parameters.description: Result of the SLAC run (1 = match, 0 = no match)
